title: Williamsburg Sunday Walk Around
content: Experimenting with two rolls of expired Kodak Tri-X 400 (shot at ISO 100). Pentax LX + Leica Summicron-R 50 F2, Pentax MZ-5n with FA 31mm F1.8.
summary: Experimenting with two rolls of expired Kodak Tri-X 400 (shot at ISO 100). Pentax LX + Leica Summicron-R 50 F2, Pentax MZ-5n with FA 31mm F1.8.
